diagrams.title: Trend Types in Capacity Planning
diagrams.description: Shows three main trend patterns: upward (increasing demand), downward (decreasing demand), and stable (constant demand)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how to identify and interpret different demand patterns for forecasting decisions

diagrams.title: Time Series Decomposition
diagrams.description: Breaks down time series data into its components: trend, seasonality, and residuals
diagrams.purpose: Understand how to separate and analyze different patterns in historical data for accurate forecasting

diagrams.title: Growth Model Curves
diagrams.description: Compares different growth models: linear, exponential, and logistic
diagrams.purpose: Select appropriate forecasting model based on observed demand pattern characteristics

diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Forecasting Process
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step process from data collection to forecast implementation
diagrams.purpose: Understand the complete workflow for systematic trend prediction in capacity planning
